Uses: Used to prevent blood clots and reduce fever and mild pain. Also used as a blood thinner in heart disease patients.

Uses: Used to treat type 2 diabetes by controlling blood sugar levels. Works by decreasing glucose production in the liver.

Uses: Used to lower cholesterol and triglycerides in the blood. Reduces the risk of heart attack and stroke.

Uses: Blood thinner used to prevent blood clots in veins and arteries. Used in atrial fibrillation and after mechanical heart valves.

Uses: ACE inhibitor used to treat high blood pressure and heart failure. Also used after heart attacks.

Uses: Thyroid hormone replacement for hypothyroidism. Restores normal thyroid hormone levels.

Used to relieve mild to moderate pain and reduce fever.

Uses: Statin used to lower cholesterol and reduce cardiovascular risk.
